category_sources: Official homepage https://www.datalad.org/ describes DataLad as a distributed data management system.
source_facts.description says Data distribution geared toward scientific datasets.
display_name_sources: Official docs title uses DataLad at https://docs.datalad.org/en/stable/.
Official homepage heading and logo use DataLad at https://www.datalad.org/.
docs_sources: Official docs at https://docs.datalad.org/en/stable/ identify themselves as DataLad technical documentation.
Official homepage links the DataLad Handbook as comprehensive user documentation.
repo_sources: GitHub README says full documentation is available at docs.datalad.org and handbook.datalad.org.
Official homepage links DataLad on GitHub to https://github.com/datalad/datalad.
tags_sources: Official homepage says DataLad keeps track of data, creates structure, ensures reproducibility, supports collaboration, and builds on Git and git-annex.
